Class MapController

java.lang.Object
com.risk.controller.MapController
public class MapController extends Object
Handle event when user interacts UI during the map stage

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    attack()
    After gather countries and dices info, pass them to model to execute the attack
    void
    backToMenu()
    Called when user click the 'Quit' during the game play
    void
    disableFortification()
    Since fortification can only be done once, so call it after one successful fortification
    void
    enteredNumArmiesMoved()
    Called when user entered number of armies moved value and press enter button, pass event to View
    void
    enterNextPhase()
    Prepare all necessary map component for the next phase, then enter the next phase Called when user clicked the next phase button
    void
    init(Model model, Map map, MenuController menuController, CardView card, CardController cardController)
    Initialize Map Controller, set references, set default button visibility
    void
    loadGame()
    Called when user clicks Load Button
    void
    openCardWindow()
    Called when user clicks Card Button Open card exchange window
    void
    saveGame()
    Called when user clicks Save Button
    void
    setCountryClick(boolean countryClickable)
    Set country clickable after conquer a country
    void
    setCurrentPhase(String currentPhase)
    Set the current phase, help to determine the next phase
    void
    setNumOfCountries(int numOfCountries)
    Set total number of countries, help to create CountryViews later
    void
    setWin()
     
    void
    skipFortificationPhase()
    During fortification phase, skip this phase if current user is not able to move armies i.e. only has one country left or the user does not want to Called by 'Skip' button on PhaseView

  • Method Details

    • init

      public void init(Model model, Map map, MenuController menuController, CardView card, CardController cardController)
      Initialize Map Controller, set references, set default button visibility
      Parameters:
      model - the Model reference
      map - is the Map reference
      menuController - is the MenuController reference
      card - cards of player
      cardController - card controller

    • setNumOfCountries

      public void setNumOfCountries(int numOfCountries)
      Set total number of countries, help to create CountryViews later
      Parameters:
      numOfCountries - is the total number of countries for a given map

    • setCurrentPhase

      public void setCurrentPhase(String currentPhase)
      Set the current phase, help to determine the next phase
      Parameters:
      currentPhase - is the current phase

    • enterNextPhase

      public void enterNextPhase()
      Prepare all necessary map component for the next phase, then enter the next phase Called when user clicked the next phase button

    • attack

      public void attack()
      After gather countries and dices info, pass them to model to execute the attack

    • enteredNumArmiesMoved

      public void enteredNumArmiesMoved()
      Called when user entered number of armies moved value and press enter button, pass event to View

    • setCountryClick

      public void setCountryClick(boolean countryClickable)
      Set country clickable after conquer a country
      Parameters:
      countryClickable - determine whether is clickable

    • setWin

      public void setWin()

    • disableFortification

      public void disableFortification()
      Since fortification can only be done once, so call it after one successful fortification

    • skipFortificationPhase

      public void skipFortificationPhase()
      During fortification phase, skip this phase if current user is not able to move armies i.e. only has one country left or the user does not want to Called by 'Skip' button on PhaseView

    • openCardWindow

      public void openCardWindow()
      Called when user clicks Card Button Open card exchange window

    • saveGame

      public void saveGame()
      Called when user clicks Save Button

    • loadGame

      public void loadGame()
      Called when user clicks Load Button

    • backToMenu

      public void backToMenu()
      Called when user click the 'Quit' during the game play
